item.title: Celebrating student achievement at the Jamie Marshall Awards
item.description: On Wednesday 29 April, the Centre for Student and Community Engagement (CenSCE) hosted its annual Jamie Marshall Awards, recognising several outstanding students for giving back to the community.

item.title: NTU Racer takes the chequered flag at Nottingham Soapbox Challenge
item.description: Nottingham’s first Super Soapbox Challenge took place on Sunday 10 May and we're delighted to announce that NTU Racer from the School of Science and Technology powered its way to first place.

item.title: Celebrate creativity at the NTU Arts Showcase
item.description: Earlier this year, NTU Arts gave members of the NTU community the opportunity to showcase their creativity as part of their annual competition.

item.title: Explore postgraduate study at our Open Event
item.description: Not sure what to do after you graduate? A postgraduate degree could take you further - and it’s now more flexible than ever.

item.title: Become a Consent is Everything workshop facilitator
item.description: We’re looking for students to join our culture-changing consent education programme - and we'd love you on the team.

item.title: UK’s security level raised to severe: what it means for our NTU community
item.description: On Thursday 30 April UK’s terrorism threat level was raised from substantial to severe. The government has advised the public to be alert and vigilant but not alarmed.

item.title: Check-in with our Next Steps survey and you could win a £100 Amazon voucher
item.description: NTU Employability is here to support you throughout your time at NTU and after you graduate.

item.title: Our top five tips to Stamp Out Stress this exam season
item.description: Unwind, recharge, and stay balanced with these stress‑management tips from our HealthyNTU team.

item.title: What’s next after your degree? Explore your postgraduate options
item.description: Whether you’ve got a clear career path in mind, or you’re still figuring it out, postgraduate study at NTU can help you take the next step.

item.title: Some of our online services unavailable from Friday 24 April until Monday 27 April
item.description: Due to essential maintenance, there will be a scheduled break in some of our online services from 5pm on Friday 24 April until 8am on Monday 27 April.
